column1: Hey Colette, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
Cool I got you. which destination were you lookin to book
We are probably leaning towards one in Punta Cana or Cancun
Yea ill be in Punta Cana, both are lit tho
how many ppl in your group so far?
yea thats solid! you all from the same school?
oh dope we've had a few groups from your school roll through. y'all def know how to party lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
probably in the next week or so
okay bet yea I'll send what we have at the moment and add a payment plan. lets you reserve things with a deposit and then pay the rest off in a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
Laughed at “oh dope we've had a few groups from your school roll through. y'all def know how to party lol”
dope whats the best email to send to
just sent that over lmk if you got it
i'll look it over w my friends
perfect yea lmk what the squad thinks
heyy Colette whats up, how we feelin about those options so far?
hey checkin in, we narrow in on which option we wanna roll with?
I think we are mainly interested in the Punta Cana options
Is there a possibility to change the dates to the 18-22
yea we can do 18-22! pricing will be the same as the 4 night stay option
I def like Punta Cana the most, thats where I'll be
Is that a more popular option? Why do u like it better lol
theyre both popular. like very. I personally just like the experience better, I feel the resort option we have is nicer
ok then we might be leaning towards that
just figuring out if we have a fourth or not
Could u give me more information of the party packages please

yea the party pass comes with round trip transportation, express entry, open bar, and cover charge and the nightclub events we host off of the resort. the venues are Imagine Cave, Coco Bongo, Maroca, and the Open Bar Booze Cruise
so without that package the night life would primarily be at the hotel?
yea theres a small nightclub on the resort, its not like top level nightlife but it gets the job done
heyy Colette checkin in, how is everything looking on your end so far?
Everything looks good, just getting the final confirmations
Goal is to book this weekend Punta Cana for four nights
Just one more quick question.... What would the transportation between club and hotel look like?
for Punta cana we have coach buses that pick us all up!
So is there a set departure and arrival times?
yea our team will let you know exactly when to be in the lobby for the buses
Our goal is to book by the weekend for the dates 17-21
Okay bet yea pricing will be the same as the 4 night stay
Would it be a different link to book those specific dates?
yea what I sent you is just a sample quote, not your actual reservation
when y'all are ready, I set up your actual reservation portal, for each of you to hop in and slot onto the trip
did you want me to get that started?
hey morning. apologies I was offline
so March 12-21, is it 3 people or 4? we can always adjust as we go just need a starting number
perfect. we ready to get deposited today?
got it, will set this up now and send over! gimme 10 mins if thats cool
ahh sorry the most recent text above wasnt meant for you. hectic morning lol
lol my b. but yea I can also set yours up too. once I set the reservation up it deactivates with 24 hours of inactivity, just a heads up
yea Ill send it over in a few mins!
Sorry to bother you but the flights would actually be easier if the dates were 18-22. Could you change it possibly? Sorry about that
yea all good will adjust that rn
Would it also be possible to move when the deposit is due to tomorrow? If not that's fine
did a few ppl need more time?
Yeah we just have a plan to sit down together tomorrow and pay it together
But if not I can get on their asses
Its def safest to get it in by tonight. I can try to put in for the extension but ops is out and wont be back on til tomorrow afternoon
it may time out by then since I started it this am
so if i paid but they haven't would i get a refund if it times out
nah it wont time out if you were to pay, that'll get it active
Oh ok well I paid they haven't
So they would be able to pay tomorrow?
oh okay dope, you'll be good then, I would just get on them to get going
Hey this is Colette. I just had a couple questions abt the party package.... how is the transportation arranged? when is the deadline to add the package? like what is charge covering for?
there will be coach bus transportation from the resort to the venues. when you get here our onsite staff will tell you exactly what time to meet them in the lobby
hey Collette need you two to pay off the balance for imagine Cave within the next 2 hours otherwise it'll expire
lmk if you need help logging in!
Ill talk to my friends... if it does expire do I and my other friend get our money back?
Yours is all ready paid for so you're all good. It would expire for you
what would the expiring entail? like we wouldn't be able to go? or
as long as you have it and paid for it, youre all good
the people that have it and havent paid for it, it will end up being removed from their account. everyones account is treated individually
hey checkin in, any update on Francesca? She's the last one we need
But I'm reading your email currently and it says that Imagine is only March 17?
Is that only time the shuttles would be able to bring us there?
we can do another day as well, the saturday or friday
hey hey, so when you get here you'll be able to check in with our party pass desk to see which other dates you'll be able to go to Imagine. Alberto on our party pass team will help you out
also any word on Francescas flight?
She's on the same flight as me and the others!
Loved “hey hey, so when you get here you'll be able to ch…”
